philippines.title: ₱860M worth of illicit cigarettes seized in Cebu
philippines.description:
CEBU CITY, Philippines — Authorities intercepted 11 40-foot cargo containers loaded with illicit cigarettes worth an estimated ₱860 million during a joint operation in Cebu on Wednesday, June 24. The operation stemmed from intelligence information that led authorities to the shipments in Mandaue City and Cebu City. The Bureau of Customs (BOC)-Port of Cebu, Philippine Coast Guard (PCG), National Bureau of Investigation (NBI), Philippine National Police (PNP), and Bureau of Internal Revenue (BIR) carried out the operation. READ ALSO: P1.7-B smuggled cigarettes seized at private port in Cebu Operation leads to 11 container vans Initial investigation showed that someone had […]...
Keep on reading: ₱860M worth of illicit cigarettes seized in Cebu

philippines.title: Ex-convict killed in stabbing by neighbor in Cebu City
philippines.description:
CEBU CITY, Philippines — An ex-convict was killed after he was allegedly stabbed by his neighbor in Sitio Duko, Barangay Duljo-Fatima, Cebu City, at around 4:25 a.m. on Thursday, June 25. The victim, identified only by the alias “Danilo,” 48, was an ex-convict. The suspect, identified by the alias “Syldon,” 42, is also a resident of the area. According to the Mambaling Police Station, the two men first figured in a confrontation that escalated into a fistfight, during which they also struck each other with sticks. READ: Cebu City shooting: Ex-convict killed in Brgy. Mambaling Police said the suspect was […]...
Keep on reading: Ex-convict killed in stabbing by neighbor in Cebu City

philippines.title: Approved voucher program bill to expand access to education — Dy
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines — The bicameral conference committee’s approval of the proposed Private Basic Education Voucher Program brings the government a step closer to expanding access to quality basic education, House Speaker Faustino “Bojie” G. Dy III said in a statement on Thursday. “Education remains the best investment we can make for our country’s future. By strengthening the voucher program, we are giving more Filipino families meaningful educational choices while supporting the important role that private schools play in our education system,” Dy said. The bicam committee approved the reconciled version of House Bill No. 4744 and Senate Bill No. 1981, […]...
Keep on reading: Approved voucher program bill to expand access to education — Dy

energy.title: ADNOC Brings BP, TotalEnergies Into Abu Dhabi’s Biggest Gas Cap Project
energy.description: The national oil company of the United Arab Emirates, ADNOC, has signed agreements with BP and TotalEnergies to let the European oil and gas supermajors take 10% each in the consortium developing one of Abu Dhabi’s largest gas fields. Both BP and TotalEnergies announced on Thursday they had signed their respective concession agreements to join the development of the Bab Gas Cap project in Abu Dhabi. BP will now hold a 10% interest in the Bab Gas Cap concession, which is expected to produce up to 1.5 billion cubic feet per day (bcfd) of gas.…

energy.title: $70 Oil Could Put India Back on Track for 7% Economic Growth
energy.description: India’s economy could return to the trajectory to grow by 7% and even more in the fiscal year through March 2027 if oil prices remain close to the current $70 per barrel, according to a senior official at India’s central bank. Oil prices at about $70 a barrel eased tensions in the Middle East, and a pick-up in tanker traffic at the Strait of Hormuz would reduce upward pressure on India’s inflation and improve the outlook for its economy, Nagesh Kumar, an external member of the Reserve Bank of India’s monetary policy committee,…
